creator: blaz@amis.net
text:
Update netsaint-plugins to 1.2.9.3. Don't depend on netsaint port as
netsaint port depends on us and this creates a circular dependency.
Instead create the netsaint user/group ourselves (which is the only
reason for the netsaint dependency). Move data directory to /var/netsaint.
Warning to the commiter: contains new file (scripts/createuser), don't
forget to cvs add. This patch is needed for the upcoming netsaint port
update.
